name: happyskills-publish
description: HappySkills publishing — atomic release pipeline (snapshot + validate + bump + changelog + publish), bump, validate, convert external skills, fork managed skills, delete, and change visibility.

capabilities.summary: publish or release a skill version to the registry
intents: push my skill to the registry
ship a new version of my skill

capabilities.summary: bump a skill's version and validate it before publishing
intents: check my skill for errors before publishing

capabilities.summary: bring a foreign or hand-rolled skill under management, or fork an existing one
intents: convert a foreign skill to managed
register a hand-rolled skill I cloned from elsewhere
fork a skill into my workspace
make my own copy of an existing skill

capabilities.summary: remove a skill from the registry or change its visibility
intents: delete my skill from the registry

npm.description: npm package manager (ships with Node.js, used to invoke npx happyskills)

install.darwin: Ships with Node.js — install via brew install node
install.linux: Ships with Node.js — install via nvm
install.win32: Ships with Node.js — install via winget install OpenJS.NodeJS

git.description: Git version control (used by the release primitive to analyze changes via git diff/log)
